prompt.EN: Create a WhatsApp Flow JSON. Build a complete flow for simple service scheduling. Flow structure: 1. Screen: accept the terms of service, use 'RichText', Embedded Link and 'Footer' components.

text: This is a mock-up of ToC demonstrating the supported syntax of RichText components
By using our services, you *agree* to a these lol **Terms of Service** (*"Terms"*). If you do not *agree*, please do not use our services.
For questions, contact us at **[your email address]**.
Alternatively please go to our [Fancy web-site](https://www.whatsapp.com) to learn more about our services.
